attacking_style: Launches decisive moves on final climbs (7-8km to go) from established breakaways, using steep gradients (9%+) to distance competitors in closing kilometers rather than early aggression.

terrain_preference: Steep sustained climbs (9-10% gradient) in final 10km where power-to-weight advantage can be maximized; excels at pacing steep finishes to drop rivals progressively.
vulnerability: Requires breakaway platform to succeed; limited data on bunch sprint positioning or ability to create opportunities without early group establishment.
